tldr: Two ads are running identical body copy and two more are duplicate creative on different PDPs — that's 4 of 5 ads sharing fatigue DNA. Expect CPMs to climb 18-25% in the next 10-14 days unless the rotation gets fresh angles.

benchmark.context: OHTNYC's rotation is fatiguing roughly 2x faster than the streetwear/jewelry category median. The duplicate body copy across Ads 2/3 and the carbon-copy LIGHTSUM creative on Ads 4/5 are the main accelerants.

ads.headline: Layered to perfection
ads.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
drivers: Body copy is 100% duplicated with Ad #3 — Meta's algo is collapsing delivery
'Be unapologetically you' is generic empowerment language with no product specificity
No price, no material, no NYC angle — nothing that reflects OHT's downtown identity

ads.headline: For Your Weekly Jewelry Rotation
ads.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
drivers: Identical body to Ad #2 — auction overlap is suppressing both
Headline 'Weekly Jewelry Rotation' is the strongest hook in the account but wasted on recycled body
Same LP as Ad #2 (transparent-heart-charm-necklace) — competing with itself

ads.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
drivers: Exact duplicate of Ad #4 with only the LP swapped (cube-dice vs supernova)
K-pop collab angle is strong but splitting spend across two identical creatives dilutes signal
'Limited drop' urgency loses teeth when the same ad has been live for weeks

ads.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
drivers: Strongest narrative in the account ('main character era', LIGHTSUM tie-in) but cannibalized by Ad #5
No video format — a collab drop this big should have a hype reel, not a static
LP goes straight to PDP instead of a collection page that showcases the full drop

ads.headline: Soft Enough for Daily. Sharp Enough to Feel Like You
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ THE USUAL ♡⊹˚₊ Not the jewelry you save for "someday." The ones you live in, grocery runs, late nights, everything between. Soft, sharp, and oht to the core ♡ Meet the usual, your everyday, upgraded ☁︎⚙︎☆
drivers: Strongest copy in the rotation — 'grocery runs, late nights, everything between' is concrete and lived-in
Headline does dual-duty (comfort + identity) which extends creative half-life
Single static format means it'll still hit a ceiling without a video/UGC counterpart

ad_to_scale.headline: Soft Enough for Daily. Sharp Enough to Feel Like You
ad_to_scale.body: Not the jewelry you save for "someday." The ones you live in, grocery runs, late nights, everything between.
ad_to_scale.why: This is the only ad in the rotation with a real lifestyle hook tied to NYC daily-wear behavior. 'Grocery runs, late nights' makes it specific and ownable in a way the empowerment copy on Ads 2/3 isn't. Push budget here and build 2-3 video variants off this same angle before it fatigues.

ad_to_kill.headline: For Your Weekly Jewelry Rotation
ad_to_kill.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
ad_to_kill.why: Body is a literal copy-paste of Ad #2 pointing to the same LP — Meta is suppressing both in auction. The 'Weekly Jewelry Rotation' headline is actually the strongest hook here, so kill the ad but recycle that headline into a fresh carousel with new body copy.

concepts.hook: Jewelry that survives a NYC Tuesday.
concepts.primary_text: ₊˚⊹♡ A day in the usual ♡⊹˚₊ 7am bodega coffee. 11am train transfer. 3pm gallery walk. 11pm dive bar. The same earrings. The same rings. No swap-outs, no 'special occasion' drawer. OHT is built for the way you actually live in this city — soft enough for daily, sharp enough to feel like you ☁︎
concepts.visual_direction: Handheld POV: hand grabbing keys, subway pole, slice at 2am, cab window — close-ups on the same earrings/rings throughout. Shot in Soho, LES, Dimes Square.
concepts.fills_gap: Zero video in current rotation and no NYC-specific visual language despite the brand DNA.

concepts.primary_text: Mon: solo heart charm. Tue: stacked with the supernova. Wed: minimal — just the studs. Thu: full layer. Fri: cube dice + chain. Sat: shooting stars only. Sun: rest day, keep the rings. One set, seven looks. Be unapologetically you — but make it a system ✧˖°
concepts.visual_direction: Each card = a flat-lay or neckline shot labeled with the day. Consistent grid, OHT serif type, transparent heart and supernova as recurring anchor pieces.
concepts.fills_gap: Saves the strong 'Weekly Jewelry Rotation' headline from the killed Ad #3 and reframes it as a shoppable how-to — also the only carousel format in rotation.

concepts.hook: From CUBE to cosmos. Pieces left: 47.
concepts.primary_text: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ The supernova. The cube dice. The full drop. Built for the main character era and almost gone. Tap in before it's archive-only ✧˖°
concepts.visual_direction: Fast-cut reel: LIGHTSUM stage footage → product macro shots → real customer wearing the pieces → live inventory counter overlay. Black background, neon pink accents.
concepts.fills_gap: The LIGHTSUM collab is currently a static duplicated across two ads — this turns it into urgency-driven motion content with real scarcity signaling, which neither Ad #4 nor #5 delivers.

unlocks: Cut auction overlap on the duplicate Ads #2/#3 and #4/#5 — recover ~20-30% wasted spend
Add the first video format to a static-only account, opening cheaper Reels and Stories inventory
Replace generic empowerment copy with NYC-specific lifestyle language that's defensible against competitors
Extend the LIGHTSUM drop's revenue tail with a proper hype reel before the collab moment cools

next_step.urgency: Ads #2 and #3 fatigue inside 5 days — replacements need to be in-flight by next week.
next_step.headline: Let's get the replacements shot and live.
next_step.body: I'll walk you through the exact kill/scale sequence and how we'd produce the three concepts above on a 7-day turnaround. 30 minutes, no pitch theater.

method_note: Scores derived from observable signals in the live Meta Ad Library scrape — copy duplication, LP overlap, format diversity, hook specificity — and benchmarked against streetwear/jewelry rotations we've worked with. No CTR/CPM data was available at time of writing.
